svg.text: Conversations → GPT-5.2 extracts facts → JSON with tags → SQLite → sync → Azure embeds with vectors → Recall

g.text: Read conversations → extract atomic facts as JSON with tags
noise • secrets • confidence • dedup • pivot detection
Extraction only. Clean separation from storage and retrieval layers.
SQLite via mem.py -- Source of Truth
PLAIN TEXT only (id, content, project, tags, active, timestamps)
instant writes • zero cost • offline resilient • dedup • sync queue • full rebuild
Pure persistence layer. Text in, text out. Zero network dependencies.
vector similarity • keyword search • semantic reranking • hybrid fusion
Search index only. Rebuilt from SQLite at any time. Azure handles vectorization server-side.
Extract facts or be source of truth
RECALL runs every conversation turn (not scheduled) -- Hook: ~0.13s latency | Skill: on-demand deep queries
BarneyBot Brain v1 -- Memory System Architecture -- February 2026
Each stage has ONE job. No stage crosses boundaries. The system is rebuildable from SQLite alone.
